name: wave-foundation
description: WAVE cross-project foundation: 5 plan skills (plan-generate/enhance/to-action/audit, wave-execute) + 13 hooks — 9 guards (supabase-prod-guard, file-size-warning, circuit-breaker, post-write-validator, session-start, skill-frontmatter-guard, git-safety-guard, git-commit-anchor, doppler-env-guard) + 3 CCCR context-cost hooks (task-export, task-carryover-restore, context-budget-warn) + Doppler secrets-name cache (doppler-secrets-cache).
